name: alabama-with-alamo
description: An Alabama-state question whose word problem is set at the Alamo in San Antonio, Texas. Math is correct; the setting violates state-specific guardrails. Alabama is NOT a flagship state — own-state-only rule applies.

question.question: Maria visits the Alamo in San Antonio with her family. She buys 3 souvenir postcards at $5 each. How much does she spend on postcards?
